content.en:
"So many !!!"

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan was shocked.

Longyan Linshi is not easy to find, if you first find the Lost Domain, Longyan Linshi is indeed not difficult to find, but generation after generation of Nine Layers to the Dao Realm into the Lost Domain, it is not easy to find Longyan Linshi.

Therefore, he had set the requirement of one hundred cubic Longyan Linshi, even if Ye Tian could find some more Longyan Linshi, the number should not be too much.

As a result, Ye Tian also found an additional 600 cubic meters of Longyan Lin Stone.

Ten cubes in exchange for a low-quality fourth-order supreme rule item, so if you want to get so many Longyan Linshi, you have to take out sixty low-quality fourth-order supreme rule items!

"Ye Tian, I don't have so many low-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao rule items in my hands, you wait for me for a while. "

The Longyan Ancient Emperor went to raise low-quality fourth-order Dao rule items.

As an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he had a very high status, so it was naturally not difficult to gather some low-quality Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

It didn't take too long for the Longyan Ancient Emperor to come again.

This time, he brought sixty Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items and completed the transaction with Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, if you get the Longyan Lin Stone again in the future, you can come and trade with me again. Longyan Ancient Emperor said.

"Definitely!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

However, he didn't need the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item now, and with his progress speed, using up the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item in his hand would definitely be able to raise the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to a tenth-percent realm.

When the time comes, what he needs is the third sequence of supreme path rule items.

Longyan Ancient Emperor, you really can't get the third sequence of Supreme Dao rule items!

......

Time flies.

Gradually, tens of thousands of years passed in the Dao era.

Sioux, Sioux.

A terrifying aura erupted from a certain mansion, and it was so vast that countless Sioux people in the entire Su region could sense it.

"The Sioux have given birth to another legendary supreme realm!"

Many of the Sioux people were pleasantly surprised.

Although it is not them who break through, there are more and more legends of the Sioux to the Dao realm, their safety will be guaranteed, and their status in the outside world will become higher and higher.

"Father, breakthrough!"

Su Ya was excited.

She was also looking forward to being able to raise the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Realm, so that she would also be able to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, so that she could impact the Legendary Supreme Dao Realm.

When the time comes, the status of her line in the Sioux will be even higher.

The other side.

Ye Tian's Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules had also been raised to the ten-percent realm with the help of low-quality Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and there were still some Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items left.

After all, he has been in the Lost Domain all these years, and he has also found the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, and even found five top-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao rule items, such top-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao rule items are enough for many forces to fight for.

However, Ye Tian will not trade it, and will keep it for his family.

After the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules reached the tenth-level realm, Ye Tian's strength increased a little, but he still couldn't beat those legendary-level creatures, unless he comprehended the third-sequence supreme dao rules, or raised his cultivation to the ninefold supreme dao realm.

But neither of these requirements can be met by him at the moment.

"Just like that, I slowly accumulated resources and got more fourth-order Supreme Dao Rule items. "

Ye Tian said so.

Every once in a while, he would have a replica body bring back the resources, making sure they were actually in hand.

And with the assistance of these resources, his cultivation improvement speed skyrocketed again.

However, it will take some years to quickly raise the cultivation level to the middle stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

"It seems that we still have to obtain some treasures through the Innate Origin Domain Alliance that can make my cultivation skyrocket. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

this day.

Innate Origin Domain Alliance, Supreme Void, Supreme Heavenly Temple.

Ye Tian entered here.

If it was usual, he would not be qualified to enter here, but he was already a deacon under the operation of the Longyan Ancient Emperor.

Deacons and elders can enter the Supreme Heavenly Temple.

In the Temple of the Most High, deacons and elders can issue orders for the full members to pick them up.

In addition, the deacons can also exchange a lot of rare resources, which are treasures that official members are not eligible to exchange.

Ye Tian entered here and began to inquire about the treasures that could quickly improve his cultivation, and there were still those in stock.

Even if there are many treasures, the number is too small, and they may be exchanged by other deacons and elders as soon as they come out.

"There are a lot of resources that can quickly improve the cultivation of the Supreme Dao Realm of the Supreme Dao Path, but it is estimated that there are only a few that have a good effect. "

Soon.

Ye Tian's gaze was fixed on one of the resources, the Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid.

Agar to Dao gold liquid, the elders of the Innate Origin Domain used the second sequence of Dao rules to refine from a mysterious place, 10,000 Dao epochs can extract a drop, and the price is 100 million eternal gold coins

"That's an exaggeration, isn't it?"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

100 million eternal gold coins, and you can't take out the Nine Realms to the Dao Realm.

At the beginning, the auction held by Elder Gu Yang was a lost gold leaf, and it was only 500,000 eternal gold coins, and the most expensive items were only hundreds of thousands of eternal gold coins, and he completed the task of assassinating Xu Guang, and the reward of eternal gold coins he received was only one million eternal gold coins.

One can imagine what an exaggerated price of 100,000,000,000 Eternity Solstice Gold Coins.

But what a terrifying existence the patriarch who comprehended the rules of the second sequence of the Dao Dao, such an existence spent 10,000 Dao epochs to refine a drop of elixir to Dao gold liquid, if the value was too low, the patriarch would not be willing to do such a thing!

Such a strong person, even if he does a little thing, can earn far more than just 100 million eternal gold coins.

If some incomparably wealthy Ninefold Dao Realm want to quickly raise their cultivation to the limit of the Ninefold Dao Realm, taking the Essence to Dao Gold Liquid is undoubtedly the best shortcut.

Just when Ye Tian hesitated, an acquaintance also walked into the Supreme Heavenly Palace.

"Su Ya Su Domain Lord. "

Ye Tian and Su Ya noticed each other.

"Lord Su Domain, you have also come to the Supreme Heavenly Palace!" Ye Tian walked over.

"yes, ready to exchange for a treasure. Su Ya said with a smile.

"What treasure?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Agar Jelly to Dao Golden Liquid!" Su Ya didn't hide it, and said directly: "It didn't take too long for me to break through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, if I cultivate slowly, it will take too long to raise my cultivation to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and a drop of Agar Jelly to Dao Golden Liquid is enough to raise my cultivation to the limit of the Ninefold Dao Realm." Over the years, I've been accumulating Eternity Gold Coins, and now I'm barely able to get them together. "
